mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_ingestion_task ( id, knowledge_base_id, document_id, stage, status, progress, error_message, duration_ms, created_at, updated_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{knowledgeBaseId}, #{documentId}, #{stage, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{progress}, #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{completedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_ingestion_task SET stage = #{stage, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, progress = #{progress}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rag_ingestion_task WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM rag_ingestion_task WHERE status IN ('UPLOADED', 'PARSING', 'CHUNKING', 'EMBEDDING', 'INDEXING') ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
